What We Do

Four Crafts, One Roof

From a design on your phone to a finished garment on the rack — every stage is handled in-house, for both men's and women's wear.

01

Computerized Embroidery & Printing

Send us any design — we'll digitize it and print or embroider it with precision on machine.

02

Aari Work

Hand-guided Aari embroidery for bridal blouses, sarees and heirloom pieces — fine detail, traditional craft.

03

Stitching — Men & Women

All types of tailoring and stitching, made to measure for both men's and women's garments.

04

Printing

All types of garment printing — whatever design you provide, we bring it to fabric.
